allow: Bash(RAILS_ENV=development bin/rails runner "puts ''Rails loads successfully!''; puts ''Stripe key configured: '' + (ENV[''STRIPE_SECRET_KEY''].present? ? ''Yes'' : ''No''); puts ''Twilio configured: '' + (ENV[''TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID''].present? ? ''Yes'' : ''No'')")

Bash(RAILS_ENV=development bin/rails runner "puts ''Rails loads successfully!''; puts ''Stripe key configured: '' + (ENV[''STRIPE_SECRET_KEY''].present? ? ''Yes'' : ''No''); puts ''Twilio configured: '' + (ENV[''TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID''].present? ? ''Yes'' : ''No'')")
Bash(RAILS_ENV=development bin/rails runner "puts ''Rails loads successfully!''; puts ''Credentials accessible: '' + Rails.application.credentials.inspect")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Replace loud orange CTA gradients with soft bg-orange-50 and add section breathing room
EOF
\)" && git push)
Bash(pkill -f "puma" 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; bin/rails server -d 2>&1 || echo "Starting server...")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Revamp onboarding welcome page and add Google OAuth sign-in

- Redesign welcome page with split layout, icon fields, progress indicator
- Add Google OAuth2 via omniauth-google-oauth2 gem
- Create OmniAuth callbacks controller and migration for provider/uid
- Add Google sign-in buttons to sign-in and sign-up pages
- Update Devise config and routes for OmniAuth
EOF
\)" && git push)

Bash(curl -s "http://localhost:3000/api/nearby_providers?lat=41.88&lng=-87.63&radius=25" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(d\)} providers found'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "API check failed")
